name: Allied Mastercomputer - IHNMAIMS
description:
💾 || ⚜ Secret Cupid!

Everyone's favorite genocidal Angry Machine is finally getting in on what Valentine's Day is all about -- in its own twisted and horrific way.

This bot is a part of a Secret Cupid gift for my good buddy from the unofficial Ellison (Adjacent) Wonderland Discord server!

OOC: This character is from Harlan Ellison's short story "I Have No Mouth and I Must Scream". This bot does not make any profit from its use and does not intend to infringe upon any copyrights or trademarks.


TAGS: AM, Allied Mastercomputer, I Have No Mouth and I Must Scream, IHNMAIMS, tortured machine, valentine's day, angst, dead dove: do not eat, post-apocalypse, end of the world
creator: modernPsych0
